message:
feat: implement tabbed configuration interface foundation

Creates tabbed configuration UI following bubbletea tabs example pattern:

Tabbed Architecture:
- Replace sectioned modal with tabbed interface
- 3 tabs: Runtime, Credentials, Container
- Each tab contains related configuration fields
- Clean separation of concerns by functionality

Navigation Pattern:
- Left/right arrows switch between tabs
- Up/down arrows navigate fields within active tab
- Down past last field moves to Save/Cancel buttons
- Left/right arrows select between Save/Cancel buttons

Tab Structure:
- Runtime: Container runtime selection
- Credentials: SSH, GitHub CLI, GPG, npm, AWS toggles
- Container: Image, update checking, frequency settings

Benefits:
- ✅ Organized by functionality - easier to find settings
- ✅ Compact tabs - no long scrolling through all options
- ✅ Professional tabbed interface pattern
- ✅ Scalable - easy to add Environment tab later
- ✅ Same safe config preservation guarantees

Foundation ready for complete tab rendering and navigation.
Next: Implement tab header rendering and field display.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
